title: Exandria Campaign
description: Campaign website for Scott's D&D Dweebs' Adventures in Exandria

items.title: Session 9: Showdown at Typhoon’s Rest
items.content_html:
Session 9: Showdown at Typhoon’s Rest

The warehouse burned. The party walked away with a divine egg, a fake thieves guild, and blood on their hands. By nightfall, one of them would be on another plane of existence entirely.

items.title: Session 0
items.content_html:
Session 0

On Sunday, April 13, 2025 we had our Session 0 and it was pretty great.

items.title: Session 1: Moonlit Marvels
items.content_html:
Session 1: Moonlit Marvels

Five strangers wandered into a carnival at the edge of the sea, drawn by lanterns of bioluminescent jellyfish and the promise of wonders from beyond the waves. None of them expected to leave with a quest from a creature older than the gods.

items.title: Session 2: Low Tide
items.content_html:
Session 2: Low Tide

The party woke to wrong silence. The tide had pulled impossibly far from shore, boats sat beached on bare sand, and somewhere deep beneath the city, something was booming.

items.title: Session 3: The Rising Sea
items.content_html:
Session 3: The Rising Sea

A wall of water taller than any building in Nicodranas was bearing down on the city, and the party had minutes to run. What followed was a desperate flight, a divine visitation, and a miracle no one could explain.

items.title: Session 4: After the Wave
items.content_html:
Session 4: After the Wave

Nicodranas survived the tsunami, but the city that woke the next morning was not the same one that had gone to sleep. Refugees poured in from the countryside, angry and grieving, and a single question hung over everything: why was the city spared when they were not?

items.title: Session 5: The Overflow Chapel
items.content_html:
Session 5: The Overflow Chapel

Deeper into the Sluiceweave, the party found themselves navigating ancient machinery they barely understood -- and then stumbled into something far worse than rusted gears.

items.title: Session 6: Boons and Bargains
items.content_html:
Session 6: Boons and Bargains

In the aftermath of the Kuo-Toa fight, the party found treasure, met a creature too pitiful to fear, and struck a deal with a stranger whose smile held too many secrets.

items.title: Session 7: Fire and Air
items.content_html:
Session 7: Fire and Air

The carnival burned. The city prayed to an empty sky. And deep beneath the streets, a lantern answered with fire.

items.title: Session 8: The Skew Job
items.content_html:
Session 8: The Skew Job

The party went looking for a warehouse and found a zoo. The cages were full of things that should not exist on this side of the veil.
